action_set_definitions.name: get_factory_clock
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current factory time in ticks.

action_set_definitions.name: get_machine_status
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current operating status and remaining time for a specific machine.

machine_id.description: The unique identifier of the machine (e.g., 'M_BOTTLENECK').

action_set_definitions.name: get_job_requirements
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the preparation time and material consumption for a specific job at a specific machine.

job_id.description: The unique identifier of the job.

machine_id.description: The machine where the job is to be processed.

action_set_definitions.name: get_inventory_status
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current stock level of raw materials.

action_set_definitions.name: assign_job_to_machine
action_set_definitions.description: Assigns a specific job to a machine for production.

job_id.description: The ID of the job to assign.

state_description.machines: List of production machines and their current operating status.
state_description.job_queue: Pending production jobs waiting to be assigned.
state_description.inventory: Current stock of materials and completed products.
state_description.factory_clock: Total elapsed time ticks since start.
